name: Button
description: A versatile button component that can render as a link or button with optional loading state, icon, and various style variants.

name: Project
description: A project display component that shows project details with animations and interactions, including title, description, tech stack, and links.

name: SectionFlower
description: An SVG component that renders a decorative flower graphic with optional title and pattern fill.

name: SectionTitle
description: A component that displays a section title with an optional icon, customizable styles, and a default spinning flower icon.

props.name: classNames
props.type: { container?: string; title?: string; icon?: string | undefined; } | undefined

name: TransitionLink
description: A React component that wraps a Next.js Link to add a GSAP page transition animation when navigating, with optional back navigation support.
